todo/idea -> doing/in-progress (research started). Fixed invalid maturity 'backlog' -> 'in-progress' (mpi-lib legal values: idea/planned for todo, in-progress/validating for doing). Logged shipped-workflow model files + BF16/fp8/int8/nvfp4 sizes + VRAM in research/model-files-and-sizes.md.

Edit tuning + tier decision drafted (research/edit-tuning-and-tier-decision.md) from ~25-run live A/B. PROVISIONAL: single-image edit fully mapped (turbo_int8@8step=balanced, fp8=high, bf16+LoRA-path rejected, 1MP round-up-16, shift 3.16). STILL TO TEST before sealing: multi-image input (image_1+image_2 reference/composite edits), then T2I tier.

Capability limits confirmed: Boogu = SINGLE-ref edit only (card: '1 reference image for now'), NO ControlNet exists yet (search: CN-Union exists for Qwen + Z-Image, none for Boogu, too new). Text edit IS an official feature. Competitive lane: Boogu wins fast+clean single-image edit (beats Qwen's over-smoothing); Qwen wins multi-image (3-ref) + ControlNet. Complementary, not either/or. Ship Boogu for single-edit; keep Qwen for multi-ref/CN. Multi-image live test failed as expected (image_2 ignored).

Multi-image + text test result (correction): TEXT EDIT works PERFECTLY - fp8+turbo both rendered 'He always loved me.' clean spelling + matched original font/placement. Official text-edit feature confirmed reliable. MULTI-IMAGE partially functions despite '1-ref only' card: fp8 grafted image_1's red-hair identity onto image_2's body/pose+hamster+text (blend not clean swap); turbo grabbed wrong base (reverted to image_1 scene). So Comfy dual-latent wiring exceeds base training enough to blend, but NOT reliable/clean -> still not ship-ready as multi-image feature, but 'half-works today, improving'. Node exposing image_1/image_2 = authors building toward it. Qwen still wins multi-ref (3-img, trained).

EDIT research CONCLUDED (~30-run live A/B). 3-tier edit decided (turbo-int8-8step / fp8 / bf16). WIRING started. Template boogu_edit_template.json parsed. Confirmed shape: ONE UNETLoader (node 97) + THREE sampler chains selected by Input_Tier (MpiInt node 169) via MpiAnySwitch (168, 1-indexed). Chain->tier map (live bench = truth): T1=high any_1 euler cfg4 30step simple +AuraFlow3.16; T2=balanced any_2 dpmpp_2m cfg3.5 25step simple +AuraFlow3.16; T3=low any_3 lcm cfg1 8step sgm_uniform. Generator emits 3 runtime files (boogu_edit_high/balanced/low.json), each baking (a) node97.unet_name=tier weight, (b) node169.Input_Tier.int=1/2/3. Ships as 3 sibling ModelDefs, modelFamily 'Boogu-Image-Edit', shared name, per-card sizeTier high/balanced/low (LTX-2.3 pattern). Required Input_Image -> no placeholder. Injectable titles: Input_Seed/Positive/Negative/Image/Batch_Size/Lora_1..6, Output_Image.

SEED BUG (high tier repeats) — TWO root causes, both fixed. (A) TEMPLATE: tier-1/high sampler (node 62) had noise_seed=22 HARDCODED, not linked to Input_Seed (nodes 101/108 were linked). High-tier graph byte-identical every run -> ComfyUI cached it. User re-exported linking 62->Input_Seed(133); regenerated -> all 3 samplers in all 3 tiers now read Input_Seed. (B) CODE (commandExecutor.js:1334 _hasSeedNode): cache-hit dedup guard matched title==='seed' but NO workflow in the whole fleet uses that title — all use 'Input_Seed'. Guard was DEAD fleet-wide, only harmless because fresh seeds normally dodge Comfy's cache; Boogu's frozen-seed-22 tier exposed it -> false execution_cached -> 'no settings changed' toast, no re-gen. Fixed: match 'input_seed' (+ 'seed' fallback). Verified guard now TRUE for boogu+krea2. Both needed: B stops the false toast, A makes high actually vary.
